name: Cauliflower in Fenugreek Leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice fenugreek leaves and garlic.
2. Heat ghee or oil and cook onion and ginger until soft.
3. Add fenugreek leaves, garlic, and chilies, and cook until almost dry.
4. Add tomatoes and remaining ingredients (except cauliflower) and cook until tomatoes are soft.
5. Mash the mixture with the back of a wooden spoon, then add cauliflower.
6. Add two tablespoons water to the pan, cover, and simmer over low heat until cauliflower is done.
